_comment: Manual repo curation — yours to edit; sync never overwrites this file. `pin`: repos to always surface first, in this order (own repos by name, e.g. "Web-Aware-Rag-Engine"; external contribution repos by full "owner/name", e.g. "mastra-ai/mastra"). `ban`: repos to hide everywhere — dropped from github.json on sync, excluded from LLM prompts, and excluded from repo/star totals. Matching is case-insensitive. Applied on `resume sync` and whenever the enhancer reads github.json.
